summary: Phase 6 RBAC & User Management testing complete. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Admin role badge, Users & RBAC tab, user management table with role dropdowns and status toggles, Invite User modal all working.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/cve/rbac/roles - Returns all 3 roles (admin, manager, analyst) with permissions (no auth required)
GET /api/cve/rbac/me - Returns current user's CVE role, permissions, is_active status
GET /api/cve/rbac/users - Lists all CVE platform users with user_id, email, cve_role, is_active (admin only)
POST /api/cve/rbac/users/invite - Creates new CVE user with specified role (admin only)
PUT /api/cve/rbac/users/{user_id}/role - Changes user role with validation (admin only)
PUT /api/cve/rbac/users/{user_id}/status - Activates/deactivates user with self-deactivation prevention (admin only)
Frontend correctly shows/hides Users & RBAC tab based on users.view permission
Frontend correctly shows/hides Seed Data and Run Scan buttons based on permissions
Role badges (Admin, Manager, Analyst) correctly styled and displayed
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during backend testing (test_invite_*, test_dup_*, test_role_change_*, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 RBAC complete. First user (enterprise@test.com) is auto-provisioned as admin. All RBAC endpoints tested - roles endpoint works without auth, all other endpoints require Bearer token. Frontend shows Users & RBAC tab only for admin users with users.view permission. User management includes role dropdown (Admin/Manager/Analyst), status toggle (Active/Inactive), and Invite User modal.

backend_tests.GET /api/cve/rbac/roles: PASS - Returns admin, manager, analyst with permissions
backend_tests.Manager role permissions: PASS - Has CVE/scan perms but NOT users.view/manage
backend_tests.Analyst role permissions: PASS - Has read-mostly access with scans.run
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/rbac/me: PASS - Returns user's CVE profile with role and permissions
backend_tests.GET /api/cve/rbac/users: PASS - Lists all CVE users (admin only)
backend_tests.Admin permission check: PASS - Admin has all expected permissions

frontend_tests.Users & RBAC tab visible: PASS - Tab shown for admin user
frontend_tests.Role select dropdowns: PASS - 7 role dropdowns for admin to change roles
frontend_tests.Invite modal fields: PASS - Email, Full Name, Role dropdown, Submit button
